member.name: T:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories.AvailabilityReadService
member.summary: Dapper-based implementation of . Executes a single SQL query that returns available slots, reconfiguration windows, and maintenance windows in one round-trip, bypassing EF Core for performance on the hot availability-grid path.

member.name: M:FSBS.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories.AvailabilityReadService.#ctor(System.Data.IDbConnection)
member.summary: Dapper-based implementation of . Executes a single SQL query that returns available slots, reconfiguration windows, and maintenance windows in one round-trip, bypassing EF Core for performance on the hot availability-grid path.
